name: living-lanka-marketplace
description: Living Lanka — full stack marketplace (frontend + 3 microservices)

scripts.build:services: npm run stop && dotnet build services/identity-service/src/IdentityService.Api/IdentityService.Api.csproj && dotnet build services/listing-service/src/ListingService.Api/ListingService.Api.csproj && dotnet build services/profile-service/src/ProfileService.Api/ProfileService.Api.csproj
